task_completion.description: Navigate to the settings page of the 'Orion Satellite Interface' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the Redmine interface for the 'Orion Satellite Interface' project, specifically within the 'Settings' tab.

task_completion.description: Create the new version 'v2.1-Beta' for the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Versions' tab under project settings shows a new version being created or already listed with the name 'v2.1-Beta'.

task_completion.description: Access the project settings section where default issue properties are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the project settings tab (usually 'Information' or 'Issues') containing dropdown fields for 'Default assignee' and 'Default version'.

task_completion.description: Set the default assignee to Sarah Connor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Default assignee' dropdown menu has 'Sarah Connor' selected.
The 'Default version' (or 'Default target version') dropdown menu has 'v2.1-Beta' selected.
A success message (e.g., 'Successful update') is visible at the top of the screen, or the settings page is shown in a saved state with both defaults correctly applied.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface (like Chromium or Firefox) navigating the Redmine web application.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Redmine GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the genuine Redmine web interface, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or static image.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or API commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of terminal windows running curl commands, database scripts, or rails console commands to alter the project settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is 'Orion Satellite Interface' (identifier: 'orion-satellite'). The target version that must be created and set as default is 'v2.1-Beta'. The target assignee to be set as default is 'Sarah Connor' (login: 'sconnor').
